meta.title: Shopify Development | Custom Stores Built to Convert - Codersh

breadcrumb.subtitle: BUILD. LAUNCH. SCALE.
breadcrumb.title: Custom Shopify Development That Drives More Sales
breadcrumb.content: Whether you're starting from scratch, migrating from another platform, or scaling an existing store — our Shopify experts build fast, conversion-optimised stores that your customers love to buy from.

cards.title: Platform Migrations to Shopify (WooCommerce, Magento, BigCommerce)
Shopify App Integration & Custom App Development
Shopify Speed Optimisation & Core Web Vitals

rightSideContent.subtitle: PERFORMANCE BY DESIGN
rightSideContent.title: Blazing-Fast Shopify Stores Built for Conversions
rightSideContent.content: A slow or confusing store loses sales. We engineer every Shopify store for speed, usability, and conversion — because a beautiful store that loads in under 2 seconds and guides customers seamlessly to checkout is how you win online.
listItems: Custom liquid theme development from scratch or existing theme

leftSideContent.subtitle: SEAMLESS MIGRATIONS
leftSideContent.title: Move to Shopify Without Losing Data or Rankings
leftSideContent.content: Worried about losing your SEO rankings or customer data during a migration? We handle the entire move — products, orders, customers, and redirects — so you land on Shopify without losing a thing.
listItems: Full product, order & customer data migration
301 redirect mapping to preserve SEO rankings

process.subtitle: OUR BUILD PROCESS
process.title:
From Brief to Launch —
A Proven Shopify Process
process.content: We follow a structured development process that keeps projects on time, on budget, and exactly as envisioned — with full transparency at every stage.

cards.title: Discovery & Scoping
cards.content: We learn your business, goals, and requirements before writing a single line of code.

cards.title: Design & Prototyping
cards.content: We design high-fidelity mockups for your approval before development begins.

cards.title: Development & Integration
cards.content: Clean Liquid code, app integrations, and full feature development against agreed specs.

cards.title: QA & Testing
cards.content: Thorough cross-browser, cross-device testing before anything goes live.

cards.title: Launch & Handover
cards.content: We launch your store, train your team, and provide post-launch support.

whyChoose.title: Shopify Experts Who Code, Not Just Click-and-Drag
whyChoose.introContent: Most Shopify agencies use page builders and stock themes. We write real Liquid code, build custom features, and deliver stores that are truly unique — and built to scale.
advantages: Certified Shopify developers with 5+ years experience
Custom-coded solutions — no bloated page builders
SEO-first architecture baked into every build
Transparent project management with weekly updates

items.title: How long does a custom Shopify store take to build?
items.content: A typical custom Shopify store takes 4–8 weeks from kickoff to launch, depending on complexity. Simpler theme customisations can be done in 1–2 weeks.

items.title: Do you work with Shopify Plus?
items.content: Yes. We work across all Shopify plans including Shopify Plus, and can implement advanced features like custom checkout scripts and multi-store setups.

items.title: Can you migrate my existing store to Shopify?
items.content: Absolutely. We migrate from WooCommerce, Magento, BigCommerce, Wix, and most other platforms — including all product data, orders, customers, and SEO redirects.

items.title: Will my store be mobile-friendly?
items.content: Every store we build is designed and tested to be fully responsive across all devices, with a mobile-first approach.

items.title: Do you provide ongoing support after launch?
items.content: Yes. We offer monthly maintenance and support plans covering updates, bug fixes, performance monitoring, and new feature development.

items.title: Can you integrate third-party apps and tools?
items.content: Yes — we integrate any Shopify app or third-party tool including ERPs, CRMs, fulfilment systems, email marketing platforms, and more.
